name: codex-app-control
description: Control the Codex desktop App's GUI. Two skills: codex-app-launch starts an already-built Linux Codex App wrapper headlessly (xvfb) with remote debugging (CDP) enabled and waits until ready; codex-app-cdp attaches gjc's browser tool via an explicit cdp_url, sends one prompt, and returns the latest completed response. Does not build the wrapper from the DMG.
